name: Katie McGinty
subject: at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5536632707661955072/1918838005980725248?code=McGinty)
---
Friend,

Long ago, our nation made a promise to our workers: Work hard, and when you retire, Social Security will be there to support you.

My parents worked hard so that every night, when they put their head on the pillow, they could rest easy in the knowledge they would retire with dignity. So have nearly 60 million Americans who rely on their Social Security benefits to help them pay their rent, put food on the table and pay for critical healthcare.

But the sad reality is that some Washington Republicans, like Pat Toomey, are willing to take away Americans' peace of mind by raising the retirement age and privatizing Social Security. **This would do incalculable damage to our seniors ' economic security.**

Our retirees deserve to be protected and receive the benefits they have earned after decades of hard work. In the Senate, I'll stand firm against these attacks on Social Security, but I need your help to make sure Republicans in Washington take notice.

[**Will you join me in telling Republicans in Congress to keep Social Security strong for our seniors?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5536632707661955072/1918838005980725248?code=McGinty)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5536632707661955072/1918838005980725248?code=McGinty)
---

Without Social Security there to support them, nearly 15 million more seniors would be living in poverty. After a lifetime of working to achieve the American Dream, our seniors deserve better.

**It 's up to us to defend and protect the rights of our seniors. You can help by [adding your name to tell Congress to protect Social Security.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5536632707661955072/1918838005980725248?code=McGinty)**

Thanks for all you do,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5536632707661955072/2062953194056581120?refcode=e20160515&refcode2=e20160515&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5536632707661955072/1846780411942797312).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Russ Feingold
subject: A special message for you.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
I put together a special video for supporters like you to celebrate what we've accomplished together. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d4/3194440203/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- This week, our trusty campaign van reached a milestone: 40,000 miles. From Middleton to Marinette, from Green Bay to Bayfield, since launching this campaign, we've crisscrossed the state of Wisconsin many times over. We've traveled to all of Wisconsin's 72 counties -- most of them twice! -- listening to the ideas and concerns of our state's working families. We've talked to seniors, homeowners, students, small business owners, cheesemakers, police officers, teachers -- Wisconsinites of all walks of life. 324 stops. 40,000 miles. **I've put together a special video thanking grassroots supporters like you and celebrating all that we've accomplished together.[Take a minute to watch it, and consider making your first contribution of $5 to our campaign today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d4/3194440203/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d4/3194440203/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d5/3194440203/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d2/3194440203/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d3/3194440203/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d0/3194440203/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Being on the road and traveling to every corner of Wisconsin is one of my favorite things to do. I believe that if you are to represent the great people of this state, you need to see where they live and work, and listen to them.
You see, this campaign isn't about me, or the number of miles we've logged on our campaign van.
**It's about our shared hopes and dreams for a better, more united Wisconsin and nation.**
We're less than six months away from Election Day, and we have many miles to go and Wisconsinites yet to meet.
**[I put together a special video for supporters like you to celebrate what we've accomplished together -- watch it, then help keep up our momentum by making a contribution of $5 to the campaign today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d4/3194440203/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema")**
It's going to take all of us working together to get this done, and I'm proud to be fighting with you by my side.
Thanks,
Russ
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d4/3194440203/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd-rs&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629d1/3194440203/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629ce/3194440203/VEsHBA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629cf/3194440203/VEsHBw/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42bc/1c469400/572d54b/35629cc/3194440203/VEsHBg/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---

name: Dan Hennessey
subject: We’re making a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for Indiana
body:
As Statewide Field Director for Mike’s re-election, I wanted to personally reach out and ask if you’re interested in stepping up to become a volunteer
---
| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/bc000d9867564681b9a7fe5d246a6c5c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc) |
| Friend,

As Statewide Field Director for Mike’s re-election, I wanted to personally reach out and ask if you’re interested in stepping up to become a volunteer for Team Pence.

We’re building a grassroots force of concerned activists who are helping us keep Indiana heading in the right direction by spreading our commonsense, Hoosier message.

[**Join our grassroots team by filling out your volunteer profile today!**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/5fdf0ad02cf1414297c7e41d997cc404?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc)

And there are multiple ways to get involved. Let us know what most interests you: |
| [Make Phone Calls](http://links.mikepence.com/u/ccbf76d2a85b4153ad07cef2f6294760?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=phone&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_1&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc) |
| [Knock on Doors](http://links.mikepence.com/u/d103d6eaee7e4edb8e066ebe482454d0?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=doors&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_2&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc) |
| [Host a Neighborhood Event](http://links.mikepence.com/u/c1b6f5cb78214e76b1041e7111a0ca0e?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=event&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_3&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc) |
| [Write a Letter to the Editor](http://links.mikepence.com/u/3f9ca81923e0410e94a67081797df9d5?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=letter&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_4&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc) |
| [Join our Social Media Team](http://links.mikepence.com/u/a2c2b9ac575c4818bfe61af551525f03?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=social&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_5&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc) |
| [Walk in a Parade](http://links.mikepence.com/u/64dad24d374140df9e8470e56b6fc9d0?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=parade&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_6&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc) |
| [Host a Fundraiser](http://links.mikepence.com/u/635d47a91cea408f831841398aabdbdb?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&choice=fundraiser&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_7&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc) |
| **Even if you can just give one hour each month, we are grateful for your help — every bit helps in a race like ours.[Join us on the front lines for freedom!](http://links.mikepence.com/u/398041361619482f8b97214e7a207a00?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_footer_cta&utm_campaign=wel&utm_term=election_volunteer&utm_content=wel_were-making-a-difference_8535_survey-mc)**

Thank you,

Dan Hennessey
Statewide Field Director
Mike Pence for Indiana |
| Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs & political committees are not limited.
Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited.
|

name: Mandi Karp
subject: death grip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2394/738133e4/351d3b92/7f824d26/3552313518/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160515?refcode=pme160515_m&recurring=true")
---
| Look, guys -- I am writing way more of these emails than I would like.

But when the newest poll came out this week saying that there is "no clear winner" in this race, we had to step up our game. Our goals skyrocketed. **Now we have a crucial deadline at midnight. We need to hit $10,000 .... No ifs, ands or buts.**

**Right now, we aren 't going to make it.**

I'm really worried Republicans will keep Rubio's seat and their death grip on the Senate. I'm not about to let that happen.

I know you feel the same -- that's why I'm coming straight to you in our time of need.

**If we throw everything at this now, we still have a chance. We need 62 people to take action IMMEDIATELY. Will you step up to save the day (and the Senate)?** | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2394/738133e4/351d3b92/7f824d27/3552313518/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160515?refcode=pme160515_m&recurring=true&amount=3")
---
[](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2394/738133e4/351d3b92/7f824d20/3552313518/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160515?refcode=pme160515_m&recurring=true&amount=10")
---
[](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2394/738133e4/351d3b92/7f824d21/3552313518/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160515?refcode=pme160515_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
[](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2394/738133e4/351d3b92/7f824d22/3552313518/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160515?refcode=pme160515_m&recurring=true&amount=50")
---
[](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2394/738133e4/351d3b92/7f824d26/3552313518/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160515?refcode=pme160515_m&recurring=true")
---
I'll be sitting here until midnight watching the numbers. If you step up, I know we can do it.

Thanks,

Mandi Karp
Finance DIrector
Murphy for Florida Team Murphy
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2394/738133e4/351d3b92/7f824d23/3552313518/VEsB/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2394/738133e4/351d3b92/7f824d1c/3552313518/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: How would President Trump affect your family?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
You can make a difference. | Friend --

You’ve been selected to participate in a new project. All it takes is a few minutes of your time and a touch of candor. Will you help?

We want to know how a Donald Trump presidency would impact your life. What are your concerns about how Trump could affect your family?

Donald Trump’s policy proposals are dangerous and it’s our job to make sure everyone in this country understands just what’s at stake. **Your story can help make a huge difference by showing the American people the real stakes of this election:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you very much,

HFA Stories via HillaryClinton.com

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU0OTMzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzEzNjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: You can make a difference. | Friend -- You’ve been selected to participate in a new project. All it takes is a few minutes of your time and a touch of candor. Will you help? We want to know how a Donald Trump presidency would impact your life. What are your concerns about how Trump could affect your family? Donald Trump’s policy proposals are dangerous and it’s our job to make sure everyone in this country understands just what’s at stake. Your story can help make a huge difference by showing the American people the real stakes of this election: Thank you very much, HFA Stories via HillaryClinton.com | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her: | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Get your name on the wall in a battleground state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We saved a spot for your name | Friend --

**[Today, when you chip in to support our Battleground Fund, your name will go on a wall in one of our soon-to-be-opened field offices in a battleground state like Florida or Ohio -- and we’ll send you a free sticker!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU0OTM0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzE1ODU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We can't win this thing without a fight. Our organizers and volunteers are going to be working hard and having important conversations with voters -- if this team fails to get the out vote this fall, Donald Trump could be our next president, sending the world into an economic crisis and risking our national security.

What happens in this election falls on these organizers’ shoulders, and on ours. So when it gets tough, seeing your name on the wall in the field office will remind our organizing team and volunteers that they have an army of support behind them. They’ll know you’ve got their back when it counts the most.

**Winning in November is going to be a team effort. Will you chip in to support the Battleground Fund? It's not about the money, it's about sending a message to the organizers and volunteers in each and every field office that you're with them:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0OTM0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzE1ODU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0OTM0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzE1ODU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0OTM0MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMzE1ODU3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message!
